@if (originalTitle()) { Edit: {{ originalTitle() }} } @else { Edit event }

@if (loading()) {
Loading event…
} @else if (loadError(); as msg) {

{{ msg }}

} @else {
@if (form.controls.title.touched && form.controls.title.invalid) {

@if (form.controls.title.errors?.['required']) { Title is required. } @if (form.controls.title.errors?.['maxlength']) { Title must be at most 200 characters. }

}
@if (form.controls.description.touched && form.controls.description.errors?.['maxlength']) {

Description must be at most 2000 characters.

}
@if (form.controls.eventTypeId.touched && form.controls.eventTypeId.invalid) {

Please choose an event type.

}
@if (form.controls.location.touched && form.controls.location.errors?.['maxlength']) {

Location must be at most 300 characters.

}
Format @if (showMeetingUrl()) {
@if (form.controls.meetingUrl.touched && form.controls.meetingUrl.invalid) {

@if (form.controls.meetingUrl.errors?.['required']) { Meeting URL is required for virtual events. } @if (form.controls.meetingUrl.errors?.['urlFormat']) { Please enter a valid http(s) URL. }

}
}
@if (form.controls.startDate.touched && form.controls.startDate.invalid) {

Start date is required.

}
@if (form.controls.endDate.touched && form.controls.endDate.invalid) {

End date must be after start date.

}
Cover image @if (coverPreview() || coverImageUrl()) {
@if (uploading()) {
Uploading…
}
} @else { } @if (uploadError(); as err) {

{{ err }}

}
@if (form.controls.maxAttendees.touched && form.controls.maxAttendees.errors?.['min']) {

Capacity must be at least 1.

}
@if (submitError(); as msg) {

{{ msg }}

}
Cancel
}
